According to this print, the print coordinates for K1 are approximately at the intersection of the horizontal line labeled "184C" and the vertical line labeled "D".

---

## 1. What this appears to be

This appears to be a circuit diagram for the control circuit of a motor starter system, likely for a conveyor or similar application. It shows the electrical connections between various components like contacts, relays, and potentially a PLC (Programmable Logic Controller) or other control devices.

## 2. Main visible components
